text.started: Robot encounter started: {robot_name}. Raider raised the {weapon_name} like this was a reasonable tool.
progress: Round report: {weapon_name} dealt {raider_damage} damage to {robot_name}. Robot HP: {robot_hp}/{robot_max_hp}. {robot_damage_summary}
Combat note: {robot_name} absorbed {raider_damage} Tea Kettle damage and filed a steam-related complaint. Robot HP: {robot_hp}/{robot_max_hp}. {robot_damage_summary}
Exchange logged: Raider bonked {robot_name} for {raider_damage}. Robot HP: {robot_hp}/{robot_max_hp}. {robot_damage_summary}
text.failed: Robot encounter failed: {robot_name} survived the Tea Kettle discourse. {robot_damage_summary} Raider disengaged with remaining dignity unverified.

text.started: Searching a black-box cache labeled VALUE ADJACENT. Raider is using both hands and neither lesson.
progress: Cache search: drawer opened, pride closed. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Cache search: something clicked in a way that suggests either loot or paperwork. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Cache search: Raider found wires, dust, and a very confident warning label. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
text.completed: Cache search completed. Packed {loot_name} and called it expertise.
text.failed: Cache search failed. The cache contained only silence and a judgmental hinge.

text.started: Searching for water bottles with the intensity of someone building a museum nobody asked for.
progress: Water search: checking under a crate, inside a crate, and emotionally near a crate. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Water search: Raider shook something plastic and declared it promising. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
text.completed: Water search completed. Packed {loot_name}. Hydration empire expands.
text.failed: Water search failed. Found only a bottle-shaped shadow and a personal flaw.

text.started: Searching medical supplies labeled PROBABLY CLEAN. Raider has accepted the legal risk.
progress: Medical search: checking every pouch with more optimism than gloves. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Medical search: found gauze, lint, and a tiny printed liability waiver. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
text.completed: Medical search completed. Tucked {healing_item} into the current-raid med pocket.
text.failed: Medical search failed. The pouch contained only crumbs and one very judgmental cotton swab.

text.started: Searching a crate labeled ELECTRICAL MAYBE. Raider is pretending that is a safety rating.
progress: Shield-recharger search: wires inspected, confidence not inspected. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
Shield-recharger search: something inside snapped bravely. {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining.
text.completed: Shield-recharger search completed. Packed {shield_recharger} for a future confidence emergency.
text.failed: Shield-recharger search failed. The crate contained one spark and a smell called consequences.

text.started: Extraction hazard started. The LZ has opinions.
text.failed: Extraction hazard fizzled. The LZ looked disappointed.

text.started: Extraction thread opened. LZ timer: {ticks_remaining} ticks.
progress: Extraction thread: {ticks_remaining} ticks remaining. Raider is negotiating with flares and panic.
Extraction thread: {ticks_remaining} ticks left. Backpack is making aircraft-weight arguments.
Extraction thread: {ticks_remaining} ticks to go. Shuttle pilot is using the patient voice.
text.completed: Extraction thread closed. Raider made it back with the bag and several legal questions.
text.failed: Extraction thread failed. LZ rejected the vibes; raid continues.

text.started: Downed thread opened. {tick_count} before the zone writes the ending.
progress: Downed thread: {tick_count} left for a miracle or medically questionable idea.
Downed thread: {tick_count} until recovery paperwork becomes extremely relevant.
Downed thread: {tick_count} before gravity wins the argument.
text.completed: Downed thread closed. Raider is upright and loudly disputing gravity.
text.failed: Downed thread failed. Recovery team is preparing the apology clipboard.
